checked.description: The checked state of the toggle button

onChange.description: Callback fired when the toggle state changes. Receives ComponentEvent with value, name, args, and event.

onLabel.description: Label to display when button is checked/on

offLabel.description: Label to display when button is unchecked/off

id.description: HTML id attribute (auto-generated if not provided)

args.description: Additional arguments passed to onChange event

variant.description: Color variant for the button (from BaseComponentProps)
